name: MOVP - CRM contact to upsert_by_external_ref
notes: Exchange <MOVP_PAT> through /functions/v1/auth-exchange, then store the returned short-lived access_token as <MOVP_PAT_SESSION_JWT>. Map CRM fields inside the payload object; do not replace it with a string interpolation. external_id is immutable; re-syncs update payload only.
